introSection: Boomerang is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Energylandia in Zator, Małopolskie, Poland. It opened on 29 April 2017.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has a tunnel, and travels backwards.

fullText:
Boomerang is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Energylandia in Zator, Małopolskie, Poland. It opened on 29 April 2017.

The ride has a tunnel, and travels backwards.
